name: Golden Knights
minorleague_affiliate: Henderson Silver Knights, Tahoe Knight Monsters

injuries.comment: The Predators announced on Tuesday (Feb. 18) that Lauzon will miss 4-6 months with a lower-body injury.
The Golden Knights announced on Monday (Jun. 30) that Pietrangelo is stepping away from hockey to recover from serious hip injuries and is unlikely to play again.
The Golden Knights said that Eichel skipped Thursday's (Sept. 18) practice because of a little tweak, head coach Bruce Cassidy told Jesse Granger of The Athletic.
